body:
Fixes #1817

## Summary
- classify auto-PR `git push` rejections so remote-ref collisions, non-fast-forward pushes, and other remote rejections are reported separately
- continue PR creation when a rejected push leaves `origin/<branch>` equal to local `HEAD`, which matches the reported incident state
- include exact repository, branch, base/head refs, branch URL, and compare URL in the terminal diagnostic and attached failure guidance
- suppress generic PR/main error wrappers after a detailed push-rejection diagnostic has already been logged
- preserve the investigation record under `docs/case-studies/issue-1817`

## Verification
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run format:check`
- `node --check src/solve.auto-pr.lib.mjs && node --check src/solve.branch-divergence.lib.mjs && node --check src/solve.error-handlers.lib.mjs && node --check src/solve.pre-pr-failure-notifier.lib.mjs && node tests/test-issue-1817-push-rejection-diagnostics.mjs`
- `node scripts/run-tests.mjs --suite default --continue-on-failure` - all 214 selected test files passed

## Case Study
The saved timeline, root cause analysis, raw issue/comment/branch data, and references are in `docs/case-studies/issue-1817/README.md`.

commits.messageBody:
Adding .gitkeep for PR creation (default mode).
This file will be removed when the task is complete.

Issue: https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/issues/1817

title: Clarify auto-PR push rejection handling
